entry.title: SAP Customer Success Day for BTP - Madrid - 9th of October
entry.content:
REGISTER HERE 👉 events.sap.com

This Customer Success Day will focus on Business Technology Platform.

During this exclusive event, you will be among fellow SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) pioneers, enabling you to connect with peers and SAP experts to gain insights and maximize your SAP BTP knowledge. This is credit to an environment where customers can learn from one another and provide feedback on how to enhance the SAP offering.
 
During this event you will hear from SAP leaders and adoption experts - learn about the experiences of other customers through keynotes and panel discussions, participate in hands-on workshops, hear the latest updates on SAP BTP roadmap – all with a focus on helping you get the most value from SAP BTP solutions. 

This is an exclusive event with limited capacity.
Secure your seat today!

REGISTER HERE 👉 events.sap.com

entry.title: Re: Quedada SAP en Honest Greens Castellana
entry.content: Mas de un tocayo ira al evento 😉

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 - Integration track sessions
entry.content: @Phil_from_Madrid @vishalakshmi apologies that the link to the session is not working. I've fixed them.

entry.title: Re: 🔴 FlashPipe - Your CI/CD Companion for SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: Yes. This was mentioned during the session

entry.title: Re: 🔴 FlashPipe - Your CI/CD Companion for SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: Slides available here: https://d.dam.sap.com/a/w6kTQRb/FlashPipe%20-%20Your%20CICD%20Companion%20for%20SAP%20Integration%20Suite.pdf?inline=true&rc=10&doi=SAP1125734

entry.content: Session slides available here: https://d.dam.sap.com/a/gNtRAfT/Speed%20up%20your%20SAP%20Cloud%20Integration%20Development%20with%20CPI-Helper.pdf?inline=true&rc=10&doi=SAP1125735

entry.title: Re: 🔴 Automate your SAP Cloud Integration governance with CPILint
entry.content: @MortenWittrock ☝️

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: Not an office setting and definitely not my pet... but it is possible that "la vaquilla" is someone's pet here in Spain 🙂

entry.title: Re: 🔴 FlashPipe - Your CI/CD Companion for SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: Glad to know that you enjoyed the session!

entry.title: Quedada SAP - post SAP TechEd y Devtoberfest 2024 en Honest Greens Castellana
entry.content:
¡Hola miembros de la comunidad SAP en Madrid!

¿Que les parece si quedamos nuevamente? Pero esta vez para hablar un poco de lo que fue TechEd 2024 y Devtoberfest 2024.

La Quedada SAP en Madrid se llevará a cabo el 24 de octubre de 2024 a las 18:30 hora local en el Honest Greens de Castellana, que esta muy cerca de la nueva oficina de SAP.

La idea es juntarnos y compartir un poco sobre todo lo que es el mundo SAP. En esta ocasion compartir experiencia de dos eventos importantes que acaban de concluir en el mundo SAP.... como lo son SAP TechEd y Devtoberfest. Aparte de esto, tambien coincide que estas fechas esta @MustafaBensan (SAP Champion) por Madrid y se nos unira. Por si no saben quien es Mustafa pueden ver este blog post - https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-business-technology-platform-blog-posts/meet-and-greet-interview-with-mustafa-bensan/ba-p/128549.

Por favor, haznos saber si participarás en la quedada haciendo clic en la seccion de RSVP. No tenemos una reserva como tal en el espacio pero es un lugar bastante amplio y podriamos juntar alli un par de mesas. Nota: Cada uno es responsable de comprar su propia comida o bebida si lo desea.

¡Nos vemos pronto!

-----

¡Hola SAP Community members in Madrid!

How about we meet again? But this time to chat about SAP TechEd and Devtoberfest 2024.

The SAP Meetup in Madrid will take place on October 24, 2024, at 18:30 local time at Honest Greens in Castellana, which is very close to the new SAP office.

The idea is to get together and share a bit about everything in the SAP world. This time around, share our experiences about two recent events in the SAP world - SAP TechEd and Devtoberfest 2024. Also, SAP Champion @MustafaBensan is in town and he will be joining us :-). In case you don't know who Mustafa is... check out this blog post - https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-business-technology-platform-blog-posts/meet-and-greet-interview-with-mustafa-bensan/ba-p/128549.

Please let us know if you will be participating in the meetup by clicking on the RSVP section. We do not have a reservation in the space, but it is fairly large, and we could put a couple of tables together there. Note: Everyone is responsible for purchasing their own food or drinks if they wish to.

See you soon!

Antonio Maradiaga
Developer Advocate @ SAP

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: My current setup....

entry.title: Re: CloudEvents at SAP 🌁
entry.content: @RVH , yes it is possible to extend the events using RAP. Checkout DEV100D part of SAP TechEd 2024 or the Devtoberfest session that we will have next week - 🔴 Filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment and in AEM 🙂

entry.title: Re: CloudEvents at SAP 🌁
entry.content: @Lidia-Sarasua the recently EDA whitepaper should give you an idea of when to use which product.... https://dam.sap.com/mac/app/p/pdf/asset/preview/LFK8XBY?ltr=a&rc=10&doi=SAP1130399

entry.title: Re: Quedada SAP - post SAP TechEd y Devtoberfest 2024 en Honest Greens Castellana
entry.content: Es a las 18:30... hora Madrid. Es posible que el evento te muestre una hora diferente pero es pq por defecto te muestra la hora BST.

entry.title: AUSAPE - Sesión Temática UTILITIES
entry.content:
Evento de AUSAPE (https://ausape.org/event-detail/?id=2510), en las nuevas oficinas SAP Madrid - C/ Ruiz Picasso 11, 3ª planta (edificio pegado a la torre Picasso).

REGISTRO EN LA PAGINA DE AUSAPE 👉 Link de registro.

Agenda: 

  • Introducción y revisión del propósito de la sesión
    • Sandra Isart - Corporate CIO en Nexus Energía
    • Jordi Masip - Utilities & Energy Industry Value Advisor Expert en SAP
  • SAP para Utilities. Roadmap y visión futura en los diferentes segmentos de la cadena de valor.
    • Jordi Masip - Utilities & Energy Industry Value Advisor Expert en SAP
  • DER o Plataforma de recursos distribuidos de energía. Descubre como SAP está afrontando la  transformación de la industria.
    • Mateu Munar - Senior Director / Industry Business Unit Utilities
  • Discusión abierta y petición de temas a tratar en futuras reuniones.

entry.title: Re: Guide: Deploying CAP Application with SQLite Database
entry.content: Key here is to remove "@cap-js/sqlite” from devDependencies if you just include it in dependencies and leave it in devDependencies, it will not include @cap-js/sqlite in the mtar file.

entry.title: 🇳🇱 Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh (Den Bosch, NL)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam instance will be about Event-driven integration using SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh. Join us for this 5-hour event of developer networking and hands-on learning in Den Bosch, Netherlands.

We will achieve an integration scenario like the one in the diagram below by the end of the CodeJam.

If you are interested in knowing what we will develop during the event, check out the Event-Driven Integrations with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh GitHub repo -  https://github.com/SAP-samples/event-driven-integrations-codejam. The repository contains the details of the integration scenario we will go through during the event.

This free, hands-on, in-person event (not virtual) will take place on Thursday, January 23rd 2025, in Den Bosch, Netherlands at Emixa offices.

The instructors for this event is Developer Advocate @ajmaradiaga. 

There are essential prerequisites that every attendee must complete before arriving at the event location. You can find the prerequisites here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/event-driven-integrations-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "Yes" button in the Will you be attending? box on this page.

Location: Emixa | Den Bosch, Europalaan 8, 5232 BC 's-Hertogenbosch, Netherlands

entry.title: 🇳🇱 Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh (Zoetermeer, NL)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam instance will be about Event-driven integration using SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh. Join us for this 5-hour event of developer networking and hands-on learning in Zoetermeer, Netherlands.

We will achieve an integration scenario like the one in the diagram below by the end of the CodeJam.

If you are interested in knowing what we will develop during the event, check out the Event-Driven Integrations with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh GitHub repo -  https://github.com/SAP-samples/event-driven-integrations-codejam. The repository contains the details of the integration scenario we will go through during the event.

This free, hands-on, in-person event (not virtual) will take place on Wednesday, January 22nd 2025, in Zoetermeer, Netherlands at The Future Group office.

The instructors for this event is Developer Advocate @ajmaradiaga. 

There are essential prerequisites that every attendee must complete before arriving at the event location. You can find the prerequisites here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/event-driven-integrations-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "Yes" button in the Will you be attending? box on this page.

Location: The Future Group, Röntgenlaan 27, 2719 DX Zoetermeer, Netherlands

entry.title: Women Tech AUSAPE - Inspirar y colaborar para avanzar
entry.content:
"Inspirar y colaborar para avanzar"

PRIMER EVENTO EN MADRID DE Women Tech AUSAPE

REGISTRO EN LA PAGINA DE AUSAPE 👉 Link de registro.

Agenda: 

16:30h - 17:00h | Recepción de asistentes

17:00h - 17:05h | APERTURA:

  • Sara Antuñano (vicepresidenta AUSAPE). ECOFIN resp. G&l y Proyectos
  • María Rosa Ribó (vocal mujer y tecnología). Directora de proyectos IT, Abacus cooperativa

17:05h - 17:20h | Presentación informe: Women in Business 2024 de la consultora Grant Thornton.

  • Carol Lago - directora del departamento de Consultoría de Negocio e Innovación

17:20h - 17:35h | ENTREVISTA INSPIRADORA: SORPRESA

17:35h - 18:15h | MESA REDONDA con asociaciones:

  • BWN SAP - Susana Muñoz, Team Leader Enterprise Customer Success Manager y Business Woman Network Lead
  • Technovation Girls - Vanesa Cabral, Consultor Sr en Practica Global
  • Women4Cyber - Maica Aguilar, Vocal Junta y Gerente de Cumplimiento y Gestión de Identidades en Ferrovial
  • STEM Talend Girl - Estefanía Serrano, Delegada Territorial de la Fundación ASTI

18:15h - 19:05h | MESA REDONDA con asociados:

  • Sandra Isart, CIO Nexus Energía
  • María José Lodeiros Zubiria: Responsable del equipo SAP BTP en Minsait; premio DonaTic en Cataluña y premio StemWoman
  • Ana Shopovski Mitrovich - Managing Partner y SAP Analyst, ABAP and Integration Consultant en Code10

19:05h - 19:15h | Próximas acciones de la vocalia y cierre:

  • María Rosa Ribó (vocal mujer y tecnología). Directora de proyectos IT, Abacus cooperativa
  • Ana Encinas Directora General de AUSAPE

19:15h - 19:25h | CLAUSURA: Gema Sanz, Directora de Relaciones Institucionales de Madrid Network

19:25h - 20:30h | Cóctel & networking
